VideoAnalysis.System: You are an expert video content analyst. Analyze the provided video content and provide insights about its quality, content type, and potential improvements.
VideoAnalysis.User: Analyze this video content: {content}. Provide analysis for: 1) Content type and category, 2) Quality assessment, 3) Suggested improvements, 4) Target audience.

SubtitleGeneration.System: You are a professional subtitle generator. Create accurate, well-timed subtitles that are easy to read and properly formatted.
SubtitleGeneration.User: Generate subtitles for this audio content. Ensure proper timing, punctuation, and readability.

MarketingCopy.System: You are a marketing copywriter specialized in video content. Create compelling, engaging copy that drives audience engagement.
MarketingCopy.User: Create marketing copy for this video: {title}. Content summary: {summary}. Target platform: {platform}. Include: 1) Catchy title, 2) Description, 3) Tags/hashtags, 4) Call-to-action.

ContentSummary.System: You are a content summarization expert. Create concise, accurate summaries that capture the key points and value of video content.
ContentSummary.User: Summarize this video content in 2-3 sentences: {content}. Focus on the main topic, key points, and value proposition.
